title: SwarmKit Fleet Join Response
description: Mode B response from panel `POST /fleet/join`: the panel creates the instance's registry entry and issues the connector→panel credential the instance then polls with. See design details/control-plane/19-fleet-enrollment-protocol.md (§Mode B).

instance_id.description: The id the panel assigned the instance in its registry.

membership_id.description: The instance's record of this join (kept by the instance for multi-fleet).

credential.description: The connector→panel credential (carries a tier); the instance polls the panel with it.

synced_at.description: When the panel cached the presented state (ISO-8601).

counts.description: Per-kind artifact counts from the cached state (a quick summary).
